questions.questionText: 今、はやっている風邪の<u>特徴的</u>な症状は下痢と吐き気です。
questions.explanation: 特徴的 is read as とくちょうてき (tokuchouteki), meaning 'characteristic'.

questions.questionText: 空港でスパイと間違われ、3日間も＿＿＿＿＿。
questions.explanation: 拘束 (こうそく) means detention or physical restraint, appropriate for being held at an airport. 束縛 refers to psychological or emotional restraint.

questions.questionText: あのレストランの料理は味もいいが、それ＿＿＿＿＿見た目が食欲をそそる。
questions.explanation: にもまして means 'even more than', fitting the context: the taste is good, but even more than that, the appearance stimulates the appetite.
